content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月18日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [vercel/eve](https://github.com/vercel/eve)
   The Framework for Building Agents | ⭐610
2. [Plaer1/junction](https://github.com/Plaer1/junction)
   VS Code chat sidebar for local AI coding agents | ⭐499
3. [baskduf/FableCodex](https://github.com/baskduf/FableCodex)
   🗿 FableCodex is a Codex-style coding agent workflow that plans like Fable. | ⭐267
4. [dongshuyan/compass-skills](https://github.com/dongshuyan/compass-skills)
   司南：个性化 AI 任务总控 Skills 系统 /COMPASS: Personal Alignment Skills OS for AI Agents | ⭐262
5. [majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills](https://github.com/majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills)
   Agent skills for building playable, polished Three.js browser games with gamepla | ⭐236
6. [rebel0789/codexpro](https://github.com/rebel0789/codexpro)
   Use ChatGPT Developer Mode as a local coding agent for your repo through MCP. | ⭐236
7. [gykim80/perfectpixel-studio](https://github.com/gykim80/perfectpixel-studio)
   AI-powered animation sprite studio — generate character sprite sheets with 8 dir | ⭐226
8. [Jeidoban/Ironsmith](https://github.com/Jeidoban/Ironsmith)
   Create personal Mac apps instantly with a prompt. Supports on-device and cloud L | ⭐218

    | ❤️7823
4. [CompVis/stable-diffusion-v1-4](https://huggingface.co/CompVis/stable-diffusion-v1-4)
    | ❤️7021

    | ❤️6578
6. [hexgrad/Kokoro-82M](https://huggingface.co/hexgrad/Kokoro-82M)

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
